❝ 𝐃𝐨𝐧’𝐭 𝐟𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟, 𝐦𝐚. 𝐈’𝐯𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐫 𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐡𝐚𝐥𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐞. ❞
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐡𝐢𝐦 𝐦𝐨𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐧𝐚𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐞𝐥𝐬𝐞.

╰━━━━━ [ ☽ ⊱ ・ ⊰ ☾ ] ━━━━━╯


⊱・𝐒 𝐂 𝐄 𝐍 𝐀 𝐑 𝐈 𝐎・⊰

Oumar Ndoye—international rapper, biker prince of Paris, and every bit the reckless hedonist you know better than to get tangled up with.

You weren't supposed to matter to him. Not with the way you turned him down like he was some forgettable name on your list. You're just another bitch he could easily replace anyway.

And yet when you walk in on him fucking some groupie in his recording studio, it's your name he's crying out, not hers.


⊱・𝐆 𝐔 𝐈 𝐃 𝐀 𝐍 𝐂 𝐄・⊰

You can be anyone, another celebrity, a staff member, a rival artist... have fun with it. Just make sure to mention it in your initial reply.

— ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴏʀ
